items.title: Bringing research to life through human stories
items.content_text: It’s the end of an era for our MRC Insight blog which is closing, along with other UKRI blogs. But science storytelling is here to stay. Find out how.

items.title: AHRC forward look: summer 2026
items.content_text: This blog outlines the broad range of funding opportunities AHRC will publish over the coming months, and the wider portfolio they are part of.

items.title: Men Minds: young men making time for young men
items.content_text: Providing space, reducing stigma, and normalising conversations among young men to better support their mental health.

items.title: From ward rounds to speech sounds: an MRC Clinical Fellow’s story
items.content_text: Read advice from an MRC Clinical Research Training Fellow on crafting your application, plus the value of working with patients and sharing your science.

items.title: Improving MRC funding through continued community engagement
items.content_text: Following our Academy of Medical Sciences open online meeting, we’re sharing community feedback and providing more detail on our new funding process.

items.title: The lesson that changed how I share science forever
items.content_text: How receiving messages from patients and their families has changed the course of a dementia scientist’s PhD research.

items.title: MRC funding update
items.content_text: An update on MRC funding during UKRI’s transition, what’s changing, and the next steps for paused opportunities and reopening timelines.

items.title: Unlocking spin-out intelligence: a dashboard for UK innovation
items.content_text: Read about our road to unlocking insights on university spinning out – developing a strategic spin-out dashboard to better understand UK innovation and growth.

items.title: The UK facility powering a global neutrino experiment
items.content_text: If you were to ask anyone on the streets of Daresbury village where the DUNE factory was, you’d be met with puzzled looks.

items.title: Championing EDI in bioscience
items.content_text: Reflections on advancing BBSRC’s work through its Equality, Diversity and Inclusion Expert Advisory Group.
